name: Legendary Bushwhack
description: Legendary Bushwhack is the Legendary counterpart of the Life Trap Master, Bushwhack, in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: For centuries, Skylanders have competed in gladiator-style events inside epic arenas of sport, where only the greatest of combatants become immortalized as magical, golden statues that stand watch as guardians. These are the Legendary Skylanders. Whenever the world is in peril, special Portal Masters can bring these statues to life and summon the Legendary Skylanders to defend Skylands against any evil that threatens it.
personality: Legendary Bushwhack is a noble warrior who serves as a guardian of the Arcadian Timberland. As a Legendary Skylander, he represents the pinnacle of combat skill and heroism, immortalized in gold for his deeds.

story.content: For centuries, Skylanders have competed in gladiator-style events inside epic arenas of sport, where only the greatest of combatants become immortalized as magical, golden statues that stand watch as guardians. These are the Legendary Skylanders. Whenever the world is in peril, special Portal Masters can bring these statues to life and summon the Legendary Skylanders to defend Skylands against any evil that threatens it.

trivia: In the artwork, Legendary Bushwhack's acorns are gold on top and navy blue on the bottom. But in the game, the acorns' color schemes are reversed.
The Power Stats (Strength: 250, Defense: 90, Agility: 230, Luck: 70) are listed for completeness but are not used in any of the Skylanders games.
gameplay: These are the starting and maximum Statistics for this Skylander in the Skylanders games. Health: 290 (max. 580), Speed: 180 (max. 228), Armor: 18 (max. 48), Critical Hit: 60 (max. 110), Elemental Power: 39 (max. 89).

basic.name: Traptanium Axe
basic.content: A powerful strike using the Traptanium Axe.

basic.name: Mystic Acorn
basic.content: Throw a Mystic Acorn at enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Headbash
basic_upgrades.content: A headbutt attack to stun or damage foes.

basic_upgrades.name: An Axe to Grind
basic_upgrades.content: An enhanced axe combo for maximum damage.

soulgems.content: The ultimate shack construction to provide strategic advantages.
